name: acg-sourcing-radar-standalone
description: ACG展会采购寻源雷达 - 独立前后端系统（脱离飞书）

scripts.install:all: cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install
scripts.db:setup: npm run db:create && npm run db:migrate && npm run db:seed
scripts.build: cd client && npm run build && cd ../server && npm run build
